_doc: Stage 09 output contract from fetch to extraction. Validated against runSourceExtractionPhase(), runSourceResultsAppendPhase(), and DOMAIN.md on 2026-03-17.
producer: runSourceExtractionPhase() plus downstream source append helpers

phase_state_output.phase08FieldContexts: Aggregated per-field context used later for validation summaries and GUI artifacts.
phase_state_output.phase08PrimeRows: Bounded list of high-signal source rows retained for prime-source reporting.
phase_state_output.llmSourcesUsed: Count of sources that consumed the stage 09 LLM extractor.
phase_state_output.llmCandidatesAccepted: Count of accepted stage 09 LLM candidate rows after validation.

per_source_record_shape.identityCandidates: Merged identity candidates from deterministic extraction, adapters, and allowed LLM identity rows.
per_source_record_shape.fieldCandidates: Merged field candidates with evidence refs and extraction method metadata.
per_source_record_shape.anchorCheck: Anchor conflict result prior to cross-source aggregation.
per_source_record_shape.endpointSignals: Mined endpoint telemetry and suggestions carried with the source.
per_source_record_shape.temporalSignals: Per-source temporal hints extracted for later inference.
per_source_record_shape.llmEvidencePack: Evidence pack used by LLM extraction and downstream traceability.
per_source_record_shape.artifact_host_key: Stable host bucket used for raw and derived artifact storage.
per_source_record_shape.artifact_refs: Screenshot, DOM snippet, and other persisted artifact references.
per_source_record_shape.fingerprint: Source fingerprint and content-hash related identifiers.
per_source_record_shape.parserHealth: Per-source extraction health object used in late-stage metrics.

downstream_consumers: runConsensusEngine() consumes fieldCandidates after stage 10 filtering.
buildPhase08ExtractionContext() reuses phase08FieldContexts and phase08PrimeRows for completion telemetry.
